asal_commit_sha: HONEST_ANCHOR_eval_v2: random-search + CLIP-OE on pop=16, 3-min budget, PRNGKey(0). evosax was absent from Modal search_image at eval-v1 freeze; good.py silently fell back to random search under ImportError. Discovered at batch-1 milestone; this file is kept as the honest anchor value (same LCF_judge bytes), eval-v2 adds evosax to the image, fail-loud good.py, and evosax_version to env_audit (Guard 11 signal). arXiv 2412.17799 ASAL supervised-target CMA-ES baseline deferred to eval-v3.
